subcodes.first_line: O thou daughter of the Kingdom! I hope, from the Almighty, that thou mayest be confirmed to the necessities and conditions of the following address
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @transcending the material condition, @being a channel for the Holy Spirit in teaching the Cause, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity, @development of capacity and readiness
